title: When I Feel Mad
subtitle: Tanuki helps you cool the fire inside.

steps.text: Make your hands into gentle fists and squeeze for a moment.
steps.hint: Feel the tightness… then let go.

steps.text: Say quietly: “I feel mad right now.”
steps.hint: Naming the feeling helps your brain calm down.

steps.text: Imagine Tanuki standing beside you, taking a big slow breath.
steps.hint: You can breathe with Tanuki too.

steps.text: Take three slow breaths together. Let the fire shrink a little each time.
steps.hint: In… and out… you’re doing great.
